action.query: best acne facial treatments in Katy Texas

content.text:
Based on a web search for the best acne facial treatments in Katy, Texas (as of April 2026), I've compiled a list of highly rated options from spas, medspas, and dermatology clinics. These are drawn from user reviews on sites like Yelp, as well as direct clinic descriptions. Keep in mind that "best" is subjective and can depend on your skin type, severity of acne, and personal preferences—it's always a good idea to consult a licensed professional for personalized advice and to check for any updates or promotions. Ratings and availability can change, so verify directly with the providers.

### Top Recommendations:
1. **Facials by Jada**  
   A top-rated spot on Yelp with a 4.8/5 star average from 30+ reviews, specializing in customized facials that target acne and skin care concerns.[[1]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Facial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX) They focus on gentle, effective treatments like extractions and masks for clearer skin. Located in Katy, TX—book via their site or Yelp.

2. **Spavia Cinco Ranch**  
   Offers a specialized "clarifying facial" designed for acne-prone skin, using detoxifying ingredients like Mangosteen extract to deep-clean and renew.[[2]](https://cincoranchtx.spaviadayspa.com/skin-care) It's praised for its relaxing spa environment and results-oriented approach. Address: Katy, TX 77494; they have online booking.

3. **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness**  
   Provides advanced, personalized acne treatments including facials tailored to achieve clear, radiant skin.[[3]](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/acne-treatment) Their clinic emphasizes holistic and medical-grade options. Located in Katy—ideal for those seeking a wellness-focused experience.

4. **AcneFix (Katy Location)**  
   A dedicated acne treatment center offering customized plans and facials specifically for acne management.[[4]](https://www.acnefix.com/locations/katy) They focus on unique skin needs with consultations to start. Great for targeted, results-driven care.

5. **Clear Dermatology**  
   Specializes in chemical peels and facials that peel away top skin layers to treat acne and reduce signs of aging.[[5]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/chemical-peels-facials) As a dermatology practice, it's a solid choice for medically supervised treatments. Based in Katy, with options for various peel strengths.

Other notable mentions include MedSpa at Villagio (high Yelp ratings for facials and rejuvenation services)[[6]](https://medspaatvillagio.com/) and Anita's Skin Care Clinic (custom facials and peels).[[7]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/) For more reviews, check Yelp's lists of top acne treatments in the area.[[8]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Acne+Treatments&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)

If you're looking for something specific (e.g., budget-friendly, organic ingredients, or combined with other services), let me know for more tailored suggestions!
